<!--

Thanks for contributing! We appreciate it.
Much of our best design work and knowledge sharing happens during code review,
so be prepared for more work ahead.

How to get your pull request merged easily ?
Small, clear, easy-to-review PRs get processed more quickly.
For more tips, see https://hledger.org/PULLREQUESTS.html .

Before submitting an AI-assisted PR, please read our Rules at https://hledger.org/AI.html .
You'll need to disclose the provider(s) and an estimate of usage.
Note that currently we prefer not to accept work done with OpenAI tools.

Our commit message conventions are described there. You don't need to master those,
but do add at least one PREFIX: to the message. The most common prefixes are:

- feat: for user-visible features
- imp:  for user-visible improvements
- fix:  for user-visible fixes
- dev:  for other/internal improvements
- ;doc: for documentation improvements  (the semicolon skips the more costly CI tests)

-->
